personality: Earnest, horse-obsessed, perpetually hay-covered. Speaks with youthful energy about every mount in the stable.

greetingPool.text: Easy there, the horses spook at sudden movements. Can I help you?
If you need a mount rested or fed, you've come to the right place.
The mare in the third stall is the finest beast on the road. Just looking costs nothing.

idlePool.text: Come now, girl, eat your oats. You will need your strength for the road tomorrow.
I have mucked out twelve stalls already today. My back aches but the horses are happy.
